mission.title: openfunction: Replace the sink.ref in events api with function ingress
mission.description: Replace the sink.ref in events api with function ingress. Requested by 0+ users.

steps.title: Check current openfunction deployment
steps.description:
Verify your openfunction version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openfunction -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfunction
helm list -n openfunction 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working openfunction installation.

steps.title: Review openfunction configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant openfunction configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n openfunction -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfunction
kubectl get configmap -n openfunction -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openfunction
```
**Description**
Since we already have the Function Ingress, we can use it instead of `sink.ref` in the events API.

If not, we would have to configure the Knative Serving network layer (e.g.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Replace the sink.ref in events api with function ingress
steps.description:
The solutions are as follows:

```go
type SinkSpec struct {
 	Ref *Reference `json:"ref,omitempty"`
 	Uri *string    `json:"uri,omitempty"`
}
 
type Reference struct {
 	Kind       string `json:"kind"`
 	Namespace  string `json:"namespace,omitempty"`
 	Name       string `json:"name"`
 	APIVersion
```yaml
> like this:
> 
>
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openfunction -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfunction
kubectl get events -n openfunction --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Replace the sink.ref in events api with function ingress" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
The solutions are as follows:

```go
type SinkSpec struct {
 	Ref *Reference `json:"ref,omitempty"`
 	Uri *string    `json:"uri,omitempty"`
}
 
type Reference struct {
 	Kind       string `json:"kind"`
 	Namespace  string `json:"namespace,omitempty"`
 	Name       string `json:"name"`
 	APIVersion string `json:"apiVersion"`
}
```
 
`Reference` provides references to Knative Service and Function

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with openfunction installed or the issue environment reproducible.
